idea-plugin.name: Agent Session Relay
idea-plugin.description:
Review an agent's changes in your IDE and relay batched, line-anchored comments back into its running session — instead of retyping feedback into the terminal.

How it works
  • Hover the editor's left gutter to reveal a + icon — or right-click and choose Add review comment — to open an inline comment box (GitHub/GitLab style) over the selected lines, or the caret line. Drag the highlighted range's top and bottom edges to resize it.
  • Press Ctrl/Cmd+Enter to add the comment. It stays in the editor as a read-only inline card under its lines — hover the card to reveal its range and its Edit / Delete actions — and is listed in the Relay Review tool window, grouped by file (double-click to jump to it).
  • Press Submit to write a REVIEW.md at the project root using Claude Code's @path#L reference syntax, then hand it to your idle agent session.
  • Use Refresh & review to reload files an agent changed on disk before you review them.
Works in any open file, regardless of its version-control status.

Links:
  • GitHub
  • Issues

action.description: Open an inline review comment box for the selection or caret line
